reviewFinding: v3.4 made evidence readiness visible, but it did not yet convert advisory findings into assigned owner actions, authority motions, escalation rules, and meeting-readiness checks.
advisoryRule: Dean Foley / Barayamal may act as advisory and trusted reviewer by raising findings, questions, recommendations, and escalations, but cannot approve the pilot, override First Nations authority, replace privacy or Indigenous Data Sovereignty review, approve official Toastmasters records, or receive unrestricted private evidence.
docketRule: Every advisory finding must become a public-safe action item with an owner type, evidence needed, acceptance proof, escalation route, and authority decision motion before any real private pilot action proceeds.
approvalRule: Do not open real intake, activate a private workspace, share private evidence, hand data to a provider, or scale the pilot until the advisory action docket is closed or deliberately carried as private meeting conditions by the approved First Nations authority group.
safetyRule: This public v3.5 action docket is fake/sample only. It must not contain real participant names, emails, access needs, incident details, official Toastmasters records, member numbers, payments, signatures, authority records, access logs, private decisions, or private pilot evidence.
noGoTriggers: Dean or Barayamal advisory review is treated as final approval.
A blocked action item is left without an owner, evidence request, escalation route, or meeting motion.
Real evidence, names, access needs, incidents, official Toastmasters records, payments, member numbers, signatures, access logs, or private decisions appear in public files.
Authority quorum, Indigenous Data Sovereignty, privacy, private environment, support, incident, or official Toastmasters boundary decisions are missing.
Provider, public reviewer, or advisory reviewer receives unrestricted private evidence before access approval.
The meeting records go without closing blocked motions or explicitly carrying conditions, expiry, monitoring, support, stop triggers, and closeout owner.

sourceAnchors.label: Maiam nayri Wingara Indigenous Data Sovereignty
NHMRC Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander research ethics

actionItems.evidenceNeeded: Confirm v3.5 page, docs, CSV, JSON, screenshots, and links contain fake/sample data only.
actionItems.acceptanceProof: Public redaction checklist signed as public-safe.

actionItems.evidenceNeeded: State advisory role, assumptions, scope, limits, and no-approval claim.
actionItems.acceptanceProof: Boundary note visible and separate from authority decision.

actionItems.evidenceNeeded: Declare initial developer/custodian role and any conflicts or dependencies.
actionItems.acceptanceProof: Conflict/custody note accepted by meeting chair.
actionItems.escalationRoute: Ask authority group to accept or vary

actionItems.evidenceNeeded: Provide private proof of who can approve, object, defer, or stop the pilot.
actionItems.acceptanceProof: Authority quorum and delegation recorded privately.

actionItems.evidenceNeeded: Approve purpose, collective benefit, data classes, access, retention, deletion, reporting, and return route.
Approve notice, consent, withdrawal, correction, minimisation, retention, provider checks, and incident response.
Show private workspace, admin owner, backups, export, delete, restore, logging, and access controls.
Test least privilege, MFA, reviewer access, provider denial, revoke, and audit log capture.
actionItems.acceptanceProof: Access and revoke test passed privately.

actionItems.evidenceNeeded: Confirm official forms, chartering, payments, member numbers, signatures, and acceptance records stay outside the pilot tool unless separately approved.
Confirm support owner, response clock, pause trigger, breach assessment, escalation, and participant support route.
actionItems.acceptanceProof: Support and incident route staffed or held.

actionItems.evidenceNeeded: Confirm any provider sees fake/sample package only until contract, authority, privacy, and role access approval.
Prepare plain-language notice, voluntary participation wording, withdrawal, correction, and support clauses.
actionItems.acceptanceProof: Notice/consent draft ready for private approval.

actionItems.evidenceNeeded: Test a fake request to withdraw, correct, restrict, or delete a record.
actionItems.acceptanceProof: Test result and owner route recorded privately.

actionItems.evidenceNeeded: Name review date, deletion/retention owner, archive decision, access revocation, and public summary route.
Convert action items into a private agenda with motions, owner asks, blocked gates, and decision sequence.
actionItems.acceptanceProof: Agenda ready and public-safe summary approved.

actionItems.evidenceNeeded: Prepare go/hold/no-go record with conditions, expiry, stop triggers, unresolved holds, and signoff route.
actionItems.acceptanceProof: Decision record shell ready before meeting.

actionItems.evidenceNeeded: Publish only aggregate status, owner type, blocker class, and next route without private evidence.
actionItems.acceptanceProof: Public status update is redacted and non-authority.

ownerLanes.responsibility: Advisory note, boundary, conflict/custody declaration, public data leak check
ownerLanes.limit: Cannot approve or receive unrestricted private vault access

ownerLanes.responsibility: Authority quorum, delegation, conditions, expiry, go/hold/no-go decision
ownerLanes.limit: Cannot be replaced by developer or advisory reviewer

ownerLanes.responsibility: Data purpose, benefit, classes, access, retention, deletion, reporting, closeout
PIA, notice, consent, withdrawal, correction, provider checks, incident route
Workspace, MFA, backups, export/delete/restore, access logs, revoke test
Incident pause, support route, breach assessment, affected-person route
Official forms, payments, member numbers, signatures, charter pathway
Fake-data handoff, provider access boundary, contract gates, no production export
First-72-hour monitoring, check-ins, support clock, pause trigger
Access support route and response commitments
Agenda, motions, evidence gaps, decision record, conditions, public summary
Redacted public status, release notes, public-safe summaries
ownerLanes.limit: No private evidence or authority claims

decisionMotions.motion: Accept public package as fake/sample safe
Table Dean advisory note as advisory only

decisionMotions.output: Notice, consent, withdrawal, correction, incident route approved
Official records remain external or approved pathway exists

decisionMotions.motion: Accept conditions, expiry, monitoring, and closeout
decisionMotions.output: Conditions can be carried into private activation

decisionMotions.evidence: All blocked motions closed or carried as approved conditions

escalationRules.response: Restate Dean advisory-only boundary and refer to pilot authority
Move request to approved private vault or reject
No-go real activation until authority quorum exists
Hold data collection and provider handoff
Hold intake, support records, exports, and public summaries

escalationRules.trigger: Official Toastmasters records mixed into pilot
escalationRules.response: Remove official records and use external official pathway
Deny export until contract, authority, privacy, and access pass
Remove details and review support/privacy route
Pause, assess breach, support affected people, and redact
Assign owner type before the meeting proceeds
Add expiry, review date, and stop trigger

readinessChecks.check: Dean note is public-safe and advisory-only
